title: HOMEPATH PROGRAM - 211info
text: KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY HOMEPATH PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides financial coaching services with information about identifying short and long term financial goals, set spending plans, Individual Development Accounts (IDA), and budget management. Also provides a First Time Home Buyer Program which can help answer questions about the the home buying process, first time home buyer loan programs, building credit scores, and resolving challenges that may prevent homeownership. Also provides a series of workshops around the topics of financial fitness, home buying, Ready to Rent, foreclosure prevention, and default counseling. 1445 Avalon Street Klamath Falls, OR 97603 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Thursday 9am-5pm Email (541) 884-0649 121 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 884-0649 Main phone (866) 358-8549 Toll-free (541) 883-1568 FAX Intake (541) 884-0649 ext 121 IDA Coordinator/Housing Counselor Donna Lindsey [email protected] Toll-free (866) 538-8549 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath and Lake Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm Services: Credit Counseling Financial Literacy Training Homebuyer/Home Purchase Counseling HUD Approved Counseling Agencies Individual Development Accounts Mortgage Delinquency and Default Counseling Personal Financial Counseling Tenant Readiness Education Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - RURAL DEVELOPMENT AND TAX CREDIT PROPERTIES HOUSING/SHELTER - SECTION 8 HOUSING CHOICE VOUCHER AND PROJECT-BASED PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH HOUSING AUTHORITY
